📅 Until the Day Before — Eat Normally

No special diet is needed until the day before the procedure. Your child may eat their regular foods.

📅 1 Day Before — Low-Residue Through Lunch

Low-residue foods are OK for breakfast and lunch (see below). After 2:00 PM — clear liquids only; no more dairy — no milk, yogurt, ice cream, etc.

AVOID OK to eat (breakfast & lunch)
Whole grains, nuts, seeds White bread, rice, pasta, potatoes (no skin)
Raw fruits and vegetables Bananas, melon, cooked veggies
Corn, beans, popcorn Eggs, chicken, fish, turkey
Fried / greasy foods Mac & cheese, yogurt, pudding

After 2:00 PM — clear liquids only:

AVOID OK to drink
ALL solid food and dairy Water, Gatorade/Powerade (not red/purple)
RED or PURPLE drinks or foods Apple juice, white grape juice
Alcohol; juices with pulp Lemonade, clear soda, clear broth; popsicles, plain Jell-O (not red/purple); tea/coffee without milk
